parsed_output.justification: The transcript is heavily garbled, but a few key points stand out: several players accuse each other, yet none publicly claim direct knowledge of another’s role.  In the exchange, only one player—Pete—asserts seeing a Werewolf card when looking at the center and repeatedly claims his own identity and that of others (e.g., "Pete: This is the Werewolf" and later "Pete: Yeah, I was the Werewolf").  Such statements imply that Pete may have been the robbers’ target or ended as a Werewolf after the night actions.  No other player displays consistent evidence of having been the Werewolf from the recorded comments.  Consequently, based on the available clues, Pete stands out as the most plausible werewolf.
